home.tagline: Track your products and manage their lifecycle
home.emptyDescription: Scan a product QR code or add products from search to start building your collection.
home.noMatchWithTag: No products match the selected category and tag "{{tag}}".

tags.title: Manage Tags
tags.description: Rename or remove tags across all products in your collection.
tags.emptyDescription: Add tags to a product from the edit screen, then manage them here.
tags.renameDescription: Update this tag everywhere it is used in your collection.
tags.deleteConfirm: This will remove "{{name}}" from all products in your collection. This cannot be undone.

search.emptyDescription: Find products by name, brand, model, or category. Or look up new products in the Find Products tab.
search.noResultsDescription: Try searching with different keywords or clearing the tag filter.
search.googleEmptyDescription: Type a product name, brand, or model to search Google. Results open in a new tab.
search.externalNotFound: No product found. Try a different name or barcode.
search.externalEmptyDescription: Search by product name, brand, or EAN barcode to find products from external catalogs.
search.urlError: Could not extract product details from that URL.

feed.title: Feed
feed.signInTitle: Sign In to See Your Feed
feed.signInDescription: News and spots from brands you own products from, plus your activity and care tips.
feed.emptyDescription: Add products (with a brand) to see brand news and commercials, or scan items to build your feed.

legalPage.title: Legal
legalPage.intro: Information about using the Thap app.
legalPage.termsBody: Thap is provided as-is for managing your products. Use the app in line with applicable laws and the policies of your organization.
legalPage.privacyBody: We process account and product data to provide the service. See your deployment documentation for data processors and retention.
legalPage.contactBody: For legal requests, contact the team responsible for your Thap deployment.

helpPage.title: Help & Support
helpPage.scanBody: Use the scan button to read QR codes or barcodes. Ensure good lighting and hold the camera steady.
helpPage.feedBody: Your feed shows updates related to products you own, including brand news when your deployment adds curated content.
helpPage.aiBody: Configure an AI provider in Settings if your deployment supports it.
helpPage.moreBody: Reach out to your deployment administrator or support channel.

settings.title: Settings
settings.removeDuplicatesHelp: This will remove duplicate products and scan history entries from your account.
settings.confirmCleanup: Remove duplicate products and scan history? This cannot be undone.
settings.cleanupSuccess: Removed {{instances}} duplicate products and {{scans}} duplicate scans

productDetail.title: Product Details
productDetail.removeDialogDescription: This will remove "{{name}}" from your collection. Your documents and notes for this product will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
productDetail.shareDialogDescription: Anyone with this link can view product details and add it to their collection.
productDetail.feedbackPlaceholder: Write your message to the brand…
productDetail.feedbackError: Could not send feedback. Try again later.
productDetail.feedbackCatalogOnly: Manufacturer feedback is only available for catalog products, not barcode-only lookups.
productDetail.qrCodeDescription: Scan this QR code to view the product

productRegister.title: Register Product
productRegister.noForm: No manufacturer registration is available for this product.
productRegister.needOwnership: Add this product to My Things before registering with the manufacturer.

productEdit.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this product...
productEdit.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF.
productEdit.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
productEdit.saveFirst: Save the product first before attaching documents.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.emptyDescription: Get instant answers about specifications, maintenance, sustainability, and more. Select a question below or type your own.
aiChat.errorMessage: I'm sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.
aiChat.inlineError: Failed to get response. Please try again.

aiSettings.title: AI Assistant Settings
aiSettings.heroDescription: Select your preferred AI model and enter your API key to enable intelligent product insights.
aiSettings.configureSubtitle: Enter your API key to enable this assistant
aiSettings.apiKeyHelp: Your API key is stored securely and never shared
aiSettings.successDescription: Your AI assistant is now configured and ready to help
aiSettings.helpTitle: How to Get an API Key
aiSettings.helpChatGPT: ChatGPT: Visit platform.openai.com and create an API key
aiSettings.helpGemini: Gemini: Get your key from Google AI Studio
aiSettings.helpOthers: Others: Visit the respective provider's developer portal

scan.title: Product Scanner
scan.positionHint: Point at a QR code, barcode, or EAN
scan.notFoundDescription: The scanned code did not match any known product.
scan.step2: Point your camera at the product code (QR, barcode, or EAN)
scan.step3: Hold steady until the code is recognized
scan.step4: View product details or add to your collection
scan.saveHistoryFailed: Failed to save to scan history
scan.cameraFallback: Failed to start camera. Please check permissions.
scan.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera permission in your browser settings and try again.
scan.cameraNotFound: No camera found on this device.
scan.cameraInUse: Camera is already in use by another application.
scan.signInHint: Sign in to save scanned products to your collection and history.

scanHistory.title: Scan History
scanHistory.dialogDescription: This will permanently delete all entries from your scan history. Products already in My Things will not be affected.
scanHistory.emptyDescription: Products you scan will appear here. Start by scanning a QR code.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to track your products, get AI-powered answers, and manage your collection.
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.line1: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist.
notFound.line2: It may have been moved or deleted.

userAccount.title: User Account
userAccount.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
userAccount.deleteDialogDesc: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data including your products, scan history, AI conversations, and documents. This action cannot be undone.
userAccount.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
userAccount.privacyBlurb: Your data is stored securely and is only accessible to you. You can export or delete your data at any time.

errorRetry.hint: Please check your connection and try again.

protectedRoute.title: Sign in required
protectedRoute.description: You need to sign in to access this page.

notificationSettings.title: Notifications
notificationSettings.warrantyRemindersDesc: Get notified before your product warranties expire
notificationSettings.careTipsDesc: Receive maintenance tips for your products
notificationSettings.productUpdatesDesc: Get updates about products in your collection
notificationSettings.securityAlertsDesc: Important security notifications about your account
notificationSettings.disclaimer: Notification preferences are saved locally. Push notifications will be available in a future update.

privacySettings.title: Privacy & Security
privacySettings.encryptionDesc: Your API keys and sensitive data are encrypted at rest.
privacySettings.dataAccessDesc: Only you can access your product data, scan history, and AI conversations.
privacySettings.analyticsDesc: Help improve Thap by sharing anonymous usage data
privacySettings.scanHistoryVisibilityDesc: Keep a record of products you scan
privacySettings.exportDataDesc: Download a copy of all your data including products, scan history, and AI conversations.
privacySettings.exportSoon: Data export will be available in a future update
privacySettings.disclaimer: Privacy preferences are saved locally. We never sell your data or share it with third parties.

aiQuestions.univ_001: What are the key features and specifications of this product?
aiQuestions.univ_002: How does this product compare to similar alternatives?
aiQuestions.univ_003: What materials is this product made from and where is it manufactured?
aiQuestions.univ_004: What is the current market price and is this a good deal?
aiQuestions.univ_005: What is the estimated resale value of this product?
aiQuestions.univ_006: How do I properly maintain and care for this product?
aiQuestions.univ_007: What warranty coverage does this product have?
aiQuestions.univ_008: Where can I find authorized service centers or support?
aiQuestions.univ_009: What is the environmental impact and sustainability score of this product?
aiQuestions.univ_010: What are the best options for selling or donating this product?
aiQuestions.elec_001: How can I optimize battery life and charging habits?
aiQuestions.elec_002: Are software updates still available for this device?
aiQuestions.elec_003: What are common failures or issues with this model?
aiQuestions.elec_004: Is this device compatible with my existing tech ecosystem?
aiQuestions.elec_005: What accessories or add-ons are recommended for this device?
aiQuestions.elec_006: How repairable is this device and where can I get spare parts?
aiQuestions.elec_007: What is the expected lifespan of this device?
aiQuestions.elec_008: How should I properly dispose of or recycle this electronic device?
aiQuestions.elec_009: What data should I backup or erase before selling this device?
aiQuestions.elec_010: Are there any known security vulnerabilities or recalls for this model?
aiQuestions.cloth_001: How should I wash this item to prevent shrinking or damage?
aiQuestions.cloth_002: Does this brand's sizing match standard size charts?
aiQuestions.cloth_003: Is this product ethically produced and sustainable?
aiQuestions.cloth_004: What fabric composition and care instructions apply to this item?
aiQuestions.cloth_005: How durable is this material and how long will it last?
aiQuestions.cloth_006: Can this item be repaired or altered if damaged?
aiQuestions.cloth_007: What is the best way to store this item when not in use?
aiQuestions.cloth_008: Where can I resell or donate this clothing item?
aiQuestions.cloth_009: What is the typical resale value for this brand and condition?
aiQuestions.cloth_010: Can this item be recycled or upcycled instead of discarded?
aiQuestions.furn_001: When should I perform regular maintenance on this tool?
aiQuestions.furn_002: Where can I find replacement parts or accessories?
aiQuestions.furn_003: How do I troubleshoot error codes or common issues?
aiQuestions.furn_004: What materials is this furniture made from?
aiQuestions.furn_005: How do I clean or maintain this furniture piece?
aiQuestions.furn_006: How do I assemble or disassemble this item?
aiQuestions.furn_007: What is the weight capacity or load limit?
aiQuestions.furn_008: Is this tool suitable for professional or only DIY use?
aiQuestions.furn_009: How can I safely dispose of or recycle this item?
aiQuestions.furn_010: What is the expected lifespan and durability of this product?
aiQuestions.veh_001: What is the recommended tire pressure for this vehicle?
aiQuestions.veh_002: What is the maintenance schedule for chain or brake service?
aiQuestions.veh_003: What is the average resale value for this model and condition?
aiQuestions.veh_004: Are there any recalls or safety notices for this model?
aiQuestions.veh_005: What accessories or upgrades are compatible with this model?
aiQuestions.veh_006: How fuel-efficient or energy-efficient is this vehicle?
aiQuestions.veh_007: What are common mechanical issues with this model?
aiQuestions.veh_008: Where can I find service manuals or repair guides?
aiQuestions.veh_009: What is the best platform to sell this vehicle?
aiQuestions.veh_010: How do I prepare this vehicle for sale or trade-in?

profileEdit.title: Edit Profile
profileEdit.subtitle: Update your personal information
profileEdit.name: Display Name
profileEdit.emailHint: Changing your email here does not affect your Google login.

sharing.sharedProductDescription: This product was shared with you. Accept to add it to your shared collection.
sharing.shareNotFound: This share link is not valid or has expired.
sharing.alreadyUsed: This share link has already been used.

externalLink.returnHint: Tap below to return to Thap
